trivia_bullets.text: Modern Horizons 3 (released June 14, 2024) brought back all three Eldrazi titans — Ulamog, Kozilek, and Emrakul — and included an Eldrazi Incursion Commander precon. The set is not bound to a single chronological point on the story timeline, allowing it to draw on Eldrazi appearances across multiple planes [Scryfall set data, Dexerto coverage of MH3 Eldrazi return].
sources: Dexerto: MTG fans react to Eldrazi return in MH3

trivia_bullets.text: "With shifting forms and no angel to pray to, Innistrad's werewolves were especially susceptible to Emrakul's influence." — Scryfall. The flavor text grounds the card specifically on Innistrad during the Shadows over Innistrad / Eldritch Moon block, when Emrakul descended on the plane and her psychic corruption spread through shapeshifters and those lacking divine protection [Scryfall flavor_text field].

Horrific Assault is a one-mana green fight-variant sorcery — unusual in that it adds a life-gain rider (gain 3 life if you control an Eldrazi) rather than being a pure damage spell. It is legal in Pauper and sees play in Pauper Gruul Eldrazi and Infect archetypes as of 2025 [Scryfall legalities; MTGDecks.net Horrific Assault deck usage].

Illustrated by Justine Jones. This is a first printing with no prior reprint history [Scryfall prints_search_uri]. EDHREC rank 9991, indicating narrow use — the card's home is Pauper rather than Commander [Scryfall EDHREC rank field].
